title: Harmony - Absolute Optimization
body:
**All optimization packs in one.** The goal of Harmony is to include as many mods as possible from the most popular optipacks (optimization modpacks), to create the best possible level of optimization. The full list of mods is available [here](https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1bZftt35T6wwtLUTr5wu5-Ty8oygfZfCCRapJead0BJc/edit?usp=sharing). ![FPS Results Compared](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1b9ae67eba0f2e93c33ae6205f5ab6f2b4ba3c79.png)
Other ### Version Format **harmony-mc1.21.8-v1** - harmony: the name of the pack - mc: the version of minecraft that version works on - v: the version of the mod ### Derivatives The mods in this pack can be used according to their licenses (found in the Mod List above). Any code you use found **only in this modpack** (none of the mods inside of the pack) can be used according to the project's license. ### Notes - Harmony doesn't support 1.21.6 due to [graphical issues with that version](https://www.minecraft.net/en-us/article/minecraft-java-edition-1-21-7). - 1.21.7 versions aren't recommended due to [graphical issues with that version](https://www.minecraft.net/en-us/article/minecraft-java-edition-1-21-8). - FPS Test done using default options.txt (without v-sync and unlimited fps) using harmony-mc1.21.8-v1.0. ### Test PC Specs ``` HP OMEN 25L Desktop GT12-0xxx Windows 11 Home (Build 22631) Intel Core i5-10400 CPU HP 8704 MOTHERBOARD 16 GB RAM NVIDIA GeForce RTX 2060 (6 GB) GPU ```
[![Ultraservers](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/975b29c3c9453d777f239cad60e4ca56382f2d54_0.webp)](https://ultraservers.com/stovonson)
made by splewsh
